title: dotHack Skin&Bones Mobs
description: This adds models for The World R:Craft Modpack.
body:
<center>

This is a custom/dummy version of Skin and Bones from McHorseYT's Patreon. I have his permission to upload this mod as it disables any of the custom features of the main mod.

This requires Blockbuster 1.6 and McLib 1.0.3.

This mod is intended for use in [The World R:Craft](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/the-world-r-craft) modpack, a modpack built around the dotHack series.
 
## What does this mod do?:

It adds a few new animated player models that can be used in Blockbuster! Screenshots below to see them in game!

## Skeith:
How to use: `/acquire_morph @p skin_n_bones.r1skeith`

![](https://i.imgur.com/nE5PG9i.png)

## Macha:
How to use: `/acquire_morph @p skin_n_bones.macha`

![](https://i.imgur.com/D5nOmpe.png)

</center>
